data.body: Consideration: [Interface Contract] generate-semgrep-config.sh writes .semgrep.yml to REPO_ROOT (git rev-parse --show-toplevel). Both dependent stories (4c44-9805 CI template and c9aa-abda onboarding) must reference this same path. The CI template's semgrep scan command should use --config .semgrep.yml (relative to repo root, which is the CI working directory).
